The classification of Ctenodon hintonii is part of the larger group known as flowering plants or angiosperms, belonging to the kingdom Plantae. This plant's classification is also linked to the broader group called dicotyledons, due to its having two cotyledons during germination. Further classification places Ctenodon hintonii within the order Malpighiales.
